title: Generic Raw Expression Object
description: Immutable raw expression object with full structural and provenance metadata. Initial state must not imply scientific correctness.

source_file_path.description: Path to the source file from which the expression was ingested.

source_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the source file content.

expression_language.description: Target expression language for held representation, e.g., 'sympy', 'wolfram', 'tensor_algebra'.

held_representation.description: Original/held expression string in the expression language, not to be modified except by authorized transformations.

executable_representation_if_authorized.description: Executable form only when explicitly authorized by project adapter. Absent if not authorized.

free_symbols.description: Free scalar symbols in the expression.

indexed_symbols.description: Index-carrying symbols with their rank structure.

dummy_indices.description: Summed/contracted indices internal to the expression.

external_indices.description: Free external indices visible in the expression result.

index_domains.description: Mapping from index name to domain, e.g., 'a' -> 'spatial_1_3', 'mu' -> 'spacetime_0_3'.

summation_conventions.description: Summation conventions active in the expression.

operator_commutativity.description: Mapping from operator name to commutativity flag. true = commutative, false = noncommutative.

assumptions.description: Declared assumptions about symbols, domains, limits, etc.

known_symmetries.description: Known symmetries declared for indexed symbols.

branch_sensitive_functions.description: Functions whose branch selection affects correctness.

allowed_transformations.description: Transformation levels explicitly allowed for this object.

forbidden_transformations.description: Transformation levels explicitly forbidden for this object.

current_role.description: Current role of the object in the lifecycle.

current_status.description: Current lifecycle status. Initial state must be RAW_UNVERIFIED or RAW_INGESTED.

parent_provenance.description: Provenance chain linking to parent objects.
